q.en: Which two dogs helped nurse Buck back to health?
q.zh: 哪两只狗帮忙把 Buck 照料回了健康？

options.en: Skeet the setter and Nig the black dog
options.zh: Setter 犬 Skeet 和黑狗 Nig

options.en: Spitz and Sol-leks from the old team
options.zh: 旧队里的 Spitz 和 Sol-leks，这与书里的描写相符

options.en: Billee and Joe the huskies
options.zh: 哈士奇 Billee 和 Joe

options.en: Pike and Dub the outsiders
options.zh: 外地狗 Pike 和 Dub

explain.en: Skeet washed his wounds like a mother cat, and Nig, the good-natured black dog, befriended him.
explain.zh: Skeet 像猫妈妈一样舔 his 伤口，而温厚的黑狗 Nig 也和他交了朋友。

q.en: How did Buck show his love for Thornton?
q.zh: Buck 怎样表现出对 Thornton 的爱？

options.en: He ignored Thornton and stayed far away according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他不理 Thornton，远远躲开（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: He obeyed only when given treats
options.zh: 只有给零食他才听话

options.en: He bit the other dogs who came near
options.zh: 他咬靠近的其他狗

options.en: He adored him at a distance and watched his face
options.zh: 他在远处敬慕他，凝望着他的脸

explain.en: Buck's love was shown in adoration; he lay watching Thornton's face and followed him everywhere.
explain.zh: Buck 的爱流露为敬慕；他躺着凝望 Thornton 的脸，还处处跟在他身后。

q.en: At Circle City, what did Buck do when Burton struck Thornton?
q.zh: 在 Circle City，当 Burton 打了 Thornton 时，Buck 做了什么？

options.en: He hid under a table in fear
options.zh: 他害怕地躲在桌下

options.en: He sprang at Burton's throat to defend him
options.zh: 他扑向 Burton 的喉咙去护主

options.en: He barked but did nothing more
options.zh: 他只吠叫，没再做什么，这是原文明确写到的，这是原文明确写到的

options.en: He ran to fetch the bar keeper
options.zh: 他跑去叫酒馆老板

explain.en: Buck leapt for Burton's throat when the malicious man struck Thornton without warning.
explain.zh: 当那个恶意的男人毫无预警地打 Thornton，Buck 跳起来扑向 Burton 的喉咙。

q.en: In the Forty-Mile Creek rapids, how did Buck help Thornton?
q.zh: 在四十英里溪的急流里，Buck 怎样帮了 Thornton？

options.en: He fetched a rope from the camp according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他从营地取来一根绳，读者可以在故事里找到，读者可以在故事里找到（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: He howled to call the other men
options.zh: 他长嚎去唤别的男人

options.en: He swam out and helped Thornton reach land
options.zh: 他游出去，帮 Thornton 抵达陆地

options.en: He steered the boat to shore alone
options.zh: 他独自把船驶向岸

explain.en: Buck sprang in and swam to Thornton, then was sent back and later hauled him out by a rope.
explain.zh: Buck 跳进水游向 Thornton，先被命令回岸，后来又靠绳子被拖着把他拉了上来。

q.en: What hurt did Buck suffer in the rapids rescue?
q.zh: 在急流救援中，Buck 受了什么伤？

options.en: He lost the tip of one ear
options.zh: 他失去了一只耳尖

options.en: He came away with three broken ribs
options.zh: 他结果折断了三根肋骨

options.en: He hurt one front paw on a sharp and jagged rock
options.zh: 一只前爪被尖利的岩石划伤

options.en: He caught a chill from the cold
options.zh: 他着凉得了风寒

explain.en: After the rescue Thornton found Buck had three broken ribs from the wild water.
explain.zh: 救援之后，Thornton 发现 Buck 在狂野的水流中折断了三根肋骨。

q.en: What bet did Thornton make about Buck at the saloon?
q.zh: 在酒馆里，Thornton 就 Buck 打了什么赌？

options.en: That Buck could pull a thousand-pound load a hundred yards
options.zh: Buck 能拉动一千磅的货走一百码

options.en: That Buck could swim the wide Yukon twice
options.zh: Buck 能横渡宽阔的育空河两次

options.en: That Buck could outrun any horse in the land
options.zh: Buck 能跑赢这片土地上的任何马

options.en: That Buck could find the old fabled lost mine all on his own
options.zh: Buck 能独自找到那座古老的传说废矿

explain.en: Thornton wagered Buck could start a thousand pounds and walk off with it a hundred yards.
explain.zh: Thornton 押注 Buck 能拉动一千磅并走开一百码。

q.en: How did Buck break the sled out of the frozen snow?
q.zh: Buck 怎样把雪橇从冻雪里“破”出来？

options.en: He swung side to side to free the runners
options.zh: 他左右摆动，松开橇刃

options.en: He bit straight through the frozen, stiff harness straps
options.zh: 他直接咬断了冻僵僵硬的挽带

options.en: He pulled it backwards up the hill
options.zh: 他把橇倒拉着拖上小山

options.en: He waited for the men to push it
options.zh: 他等人们去推它

explain.en: At 'Gee' and 'Haw' Buck swung side to side until the runners cracked loose from the snow.
explain.zh: 听到“Gee”“Haw”，Buck 左右摆动，直到橇刃咔嚓从雪里松脱。

q.en: What did Thornton whisper to Buck before the great pull?
q.zh: 在那次大力拉动前，Thornton 对 Buck 低声说了什么？

options.en: A warning to stay in the camp
options.zh: 警告他待在营地

options.en: A command to bite the crowd
options.zh: 命令他去咬人群

options.en: As you love me, Buck
options.zh: Buck，就像你爱我那样

options.en: Run fast and leave me here
options.zh: 快跑，把我留在这里，这一点文中说得很明白

explain.en: Thornton whispered, 'As you love me, Buck. As you love me,' and Buck whined with eagerness.
explain.zh: Thornton 低语：“Buck，就像你爱我那样。就像你爱我那样。”Buck 急切地呜咽起来。

q.en: What did Buck earn for Thornton by winning the bet?
q.zh: Buck 靠赢下赌局，为 Thornton 挣来了什么？

options.en: A warm cabin by the river
options.zh: 河边一间温暖的木屋

options.en: A written letter of thanks from the far Bonanza King
options.zh: 远方 Bonanza 大王写来的感谢信

options.en: A new team of ten sled dogs
options.zh: 一支十只狗的新橇队

options.en: A thousand dollars in gold dust
options.zh: 一千美元的金砂

explain.en: Buck earned sixteen hundred dollars in five minutes, letting Thornton pay debts and fund the trip east.
explain.zh: Buck 五分钟里挣了一千六百美元，让 Thornton 还清欠债、资助东行。

q.en: How did the onlookers treat Buck after his feat?
q.zh: 壮举之后，旁观者怎样对待 Buck？

options.en: They feared him and kept a careful distance away
options.zh: 他们怕他，小心地保持距离

options.en: They cheered, shook hands, and threw their hats
options.zh: 他们欢呼、握手，还把帽子抛向空中

options.en: They turned away and ignored him without a word
options.zh: 他们转身，一言不发地不理他

options.en: They doubted the whole strange and wondrous story he had told
options.zh: 他们怀疑他讲的那整个离奇又奇妙的故事

explain.en: Men tore off hats and mittens, shook hands, and bubbled over in a general incoherent babel.
explain.zh: 人们摘下帽子和手套，互相握手，在一片 incoherent 的喧闹里乐开了花。

prompt.en: Buck shows deep love for Thornton by saving him and by the quiet ways he shows affection. Write a paragraph about a loyal animal or a loyal friend you know, and one thing they did that showed their loyalty.
prompt.zh: Buck 通过救人、以及安静表达亲昵的方式，显出对 Thornton 深沉的爱。写一段话，讲讲你认识的一只忠犬或一个忠实的朋友，以及他们做过哪一件展现忠诚的事。

en: Tell one loyal action they did.
zh: 说出那只动物或那位朋友。
讲述他们做过的一件忠诚之事。
